message:
test(output): Add comprehensive unit tests for output renderers

Added 19 new tests to the output module (total now 59):

- theme.rs: Added 5 tests for minimal theme, severity colors, labels
- denial.rs: Added 8 tests for Unicode preservation, all severity levels,
  minimal render, wrap_text edge cases, ANSI padding
- tables.rs: Added 9 tests for theme integration, max_width, nil noise,
  compact style, missing command preview

All tests verify correct behavior for:
- Unicode character handling (emojis, CJK, accents)
- All severity levels render correctly
- Theme integration (no-color, minimal modes)
- Edge cases (empty input, zero width, ANSI codes)

Closes: git_safety_guard-advk.7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
